FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f574c356350>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-28T22:50:36Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-28T22:48:52Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-28T22:50:36Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-28T22:48:52Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/28 22:52:07.249528071 {

2026/05/28 22:52:07.249547207 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249563728 new$width <- width
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249564749 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249579577 new$height <- height
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249580359 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249595377 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/05/28 22:52:07.249611076 new$title <- title

2026/05/28 22:52:07.249630861 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249636361 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249657831 new$version <- version
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249658813 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249673651 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249674613 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249688028 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249688929 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249701964 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249702806 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249714908 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249733934 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249747790 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249748731 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249762838 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249763689 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249777986 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249778768 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249793505 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249794317 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249816951 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249818955 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249849740 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249851493 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249872242 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249873034 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249886990 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249887821 if (!missing(producer))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249901818 new$producer <- producer
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249902599 if (!missing(author))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249916134 new$author <- author
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249917046 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249933958 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249934989 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/28 22:52:07.249983460 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/28 22:52:07.249984362 "default"))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250000154 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250002117 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250021995 }
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250022796 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250039888 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250040799 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250054733 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250065005 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250065987 }
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250080784 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250081716 }
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250115690 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250116812 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250133593 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250134354 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250152007 domain = NA)
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250152749 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250168488 }

2026/05/28 22:52:07.250184498 old$family <- family
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250185260 }

2026/05/28 22:52:07.250199456 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250216138 "2.0")

2026/05/28 22:52:07.250231747 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250250642 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250251403 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250267233 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250268024 domain = NA)
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250285838 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250286770 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250308931 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/28 22:52:07.250309702 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
